source: Captured by eval-gate --update-baseline (builtin-only registry). Gate-native incumbent under the PROBE-FIXED harness (2026-07-10): infer() on the claude-sdk path now passes tools as a selection probe and returns first-turn tool_use as tool_calls. SUPERSEDES the 2026-07-06 incumbent (60.35), which was measured while infer() silently DROPPED tools — its toolSelection 25.18 was the arithmetic 'silence floor' (only not_tools cases can pass when the model never sees tools), not a measurement. Deterministic: two consecutive gate runs scored composite 76.88 with identical subscores (the second with zero circuit-breaker events after the probe-outcome fix).
note: Refresh with `npm run eval:gate -- --run --update-baseline` after a confirmed-good model swap. epsilon is composite points on the 0-100 scale.
